title: MerkleBatch
description: Merkle batch object for grouped CIAF-LCM receipts with cryptographic proof.

root_hash.description: SHA-256 Merkle root hash of all leaves in this batch

hash_algorithm.description: Hash algorithm used for Merkle tree construction

leaf_count.description: Number of leaf nodes (receipts/events) in this batch

sealed_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when batch was sealed

batch_type.description: Type of events batched in this Merkle tree

parent_batch_id.description: Optional reference for tree-of-trees or hierarchical Merkle aggregation.

start_timestamp.description: Timestamp of first event in batch

end_timestamp.description: Timestamp of last event in batch

batch_sequence.description: Sequence number in the overall chain

signature.description: Cryptographic signature proving batch integrity and authenticity
